log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Tortle — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:12+3=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!

=== ROUND 2 ===

→ ⚠ Ogre: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.

Ogre attacks Tortle — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 24 damage. Tortle — Unarmored Caster HP: 43/67
→ Tortle — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 5 vs DC 12]
